subject: Validate: clawd-7er - Fix Error Element Selectors in E2E Tests

acceptance_criteria: E2E tests can locate error message elements
Error messages are user-friendly and security-compliant
content.self_validation_notes: Commit verified, build passes. Worker reported 9/9 Chromium tests pass. Fix changed from fixed 2s timeout to waiting for loading state completion. Mobile Safari has known NextAuth redirect issue (out of scope).
